category_sources: Official README describes Watcher as a portable filesystem watcher.
source_facts.description says watcher is a filesystem watcher that works anywhere.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading uses Watcher.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for e-dant/watcher.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/e-dant/watcher; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official README documents C++ library usage, CLI programs, and Linux, Darwin, Windows, and BSD support.
source_facts.description identifies filesystem watching and portability.
